channel.title: Sound Design on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sound Design on jamesm.blog

item.title: u-he Zebra 3: The Modular Beast Unleashed
item.description: Exploring the highly anticipated u-he Zebra 3, a modular soft synth that redefines sound design with its unparalleled flexibility and sonic depth.

item.title: Physical Modeling Synthesis: The Underrated Future of Sound Design
item.description: Why physical modeling - not sampling or wavetables - is the next frontier in expressive digital instruments

item.title: Why I Play & Create Music Intuitively
item.description:
Playing by ear - discovering by accident

The Joy of Surprise

I don’t play the piano to master it. I play it because sometimes it surprises me.

That sounds backwards, especially in a world obsessed with progress, scales, grades, and measurable improvement. But the thing that keeps pulling me back to the keys isn’t control - it’s discovery. It’s that moment when my fingers land somewhere they’ve never quite been before and something clicks. A sound appears that I didn’t plan, didn’t predict, and definitely didn’t know I knew.
